memo: English localized version of the Vietnam landing page. High-quality copywriting that appeals to inbound travelers seeking 'off the beaten path' experiences. Technical SEO implementation is perfect with bi-directional hreflang and localized FAQ schema.

quality.title: Vietnam Island Guide: Con Dao, Cham Island & Hoi An | RITOTABI
strengths: Exceptional English quality with evocative vocabulary ('pristine natural sanctuaries', 'remote sanctuary')
Perfect implementation of Unicode characters (smart quotes) in JSX and metadata
Strong cluster structure with all internal links correctly pointing to English versions
High-value FAQ section that addresses key friction points for international travelers (access, best season)

issues.text: Similar to the JP version, direct affiliate CTA is minimal on this landing page, which is appropriate for a hub-style navigation page.

quality.seasonalRisk: High potential for the May launch, aligning with the end of the dry season in Con Dao and the peak season in Hoi An.
